mapper.select: SELECT R.SEQ, R.EVS_TYPE, R.RESUME_NAME, R.REMARK, R.EVS_CYCLE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(R.EVS_CYCLE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EVS_CYCLE_NAME, R.EVS_YEAR, R.EVS_MONTH, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(R.EVS_MONTH, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EVS_MONTH_NAME, TO_CHAR(R.STANDARD_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS STANDARD_DATE, R.EVS_START_DATE, R.EVS_END_DATE, R.ACTIVITY, CASE R.ACTIVITY WHEN '2' THEN 'Chuẩn bị' WHEN '3' THEN 'Tiến hành' WHEN '4' THEN 'Hoàn thành' WHEN '1' THEN 'Hoàn thành' ELSE R.ACTIVITY END AS ACTIVITY_NAME, R.EVS_LEVEL, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(R.EVS_LEVEL, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EVS_LEVEL_NAME, R.COPY_OBJECT, R.TARGET_LEVEL, TO_CHAR(R.ORDER_NO) AS ORDER_NO, TO_CHAR(R.CREATE_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS CREATE_DATE, R.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(R.UPDATE_DATE, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, R.UPDATED_BY FROM EVS_RESUME_INFO R WHERE R.SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EVS_RESUME_INFO ( SEQ, EVS_TYPE, RESUME_NAME, REMARK, EVS_CYCLE, EVS_YEAR, EVS_MONTH, STANDARD_DATE, EVS_START_DATE, EVS_END_DATE, ACTIVITY, EVS_LEVEL, COPY_OBJECT, TARGET_LEVEL, ORDER_NO, CPNY_ID, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsCycle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsYear, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TO_DATE(#{standardDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
NULL,
#{evsStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '2', #{evsLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{copyObject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 200,
#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_RESUME_INFO SET ACTIVITY = '0', UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT SEQ, RESUME_NAME, EVS_YEAR FROM EVS_RESUME_INFO WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND EVS_TYPE = #{evsType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY != '0'
AND PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_LIMIT(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SEQ, #{evsLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) != 0
ORDER BY EVS_YEAR DESC, STANDARD_DATE DESC
